text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Wha? My dream? I dunno, I haven't really got
one. I mean, I wanna try something new, and like,
I don't wanna lose...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but I'll pass on anything difficult. It'd suck to
chip my nails. So yeah, let's just take it easy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
